task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the wger fitness manager using the admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the username 'admin' in the top navigation bar, user profile dropdown, or a dashboard welcome message indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the measurement categories management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'Measurement Categories', 'Add Measurement Category', or a form with fields for category name and unit.

task_completion.description: Verify the measurement category 'Neck' with the unit 'cm' was successfully created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Neck' and 'cm' in the list of existing measurement categories, or a green success banner stating the category was created.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the page to add a new measurement entry for the 'Neck' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Add Measurement' form or modal that is specifically associated with the 'Neck' category.

task_completion.description: Verify a measurement entry of 38.5 cm is recorded for today's date under the 'Neck' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the value '38.5', the unit 'cm', and today's date in the measurement history, chart, or list for the 'Neck' category, or a success message confirming the entry.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the web browser (clicking links, filling forms). There should be no terminal windows open executing curl commands, API requests, or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual wger fitness manager application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the standard wger web interface styling and layout. The browser should not be displaying a text editor, a static HTML file, or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the browser is accessing the correct local server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the browser address bar; it should show 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1' with the appropriate wger paths, not a 'file://' URL.
